title: Anginne 8/14 Pack Stomp Rocket Refills for Kids, Durable Foam Rockets Replacement Launchers, Backyard Outdoor Garden Toys, for Boys Girls (Ages 3-12)
features: 【14 pack Rocket Refills】Includes 8 foam rocket refills, designed for Anginne Rockets Toy, After testing, it can pair with most rocket toy on the market, such as DejaNard, Dislocati, HappyGoLucky, Anginne and so on.

【High Quality】 - Compared to using foam, our newly upgraded EVA material is more durable and less likely to lose colour, and the wings and head of the rocket are specially bonded so they don't come off easily. The rocket is designed with soft rubber, which is soft and non-deformable and highly effective in cushioning impact, ensuring that your child is 100% safe and has fun while playing.

【Perfect Rocket Toy Refill 】- The core is precisely sized to fit a wide range of rocket toys launchers available on the market and is easy to operate. Perfect back-up plan - the gravity effect used in the head makes our rockets easier to control the range and less likely to get lost or hang up in trees! Such a rocket refill pack would be great to enrich your child's rocket play once again!

【Perfect Backup】With the replacement rockets, your child can keep launching if the rocket is lost or damaged! These rocket toy can be used outdoors, in the garden or in the parks. It can unleash your child's energy and keep them away from screens.

【Satisfaction Guarantee】We want to provide children with fun, high quality toys! If you have any questions or suggestions about our products, please contact us, we have a professional after-sales service team at your service.
description: Product Description Durable Foam Material Full foam composition, safe play Durable yet soft for long-lasting play Internal hollow design for easy installation Rocket Refills 14 Pack Children's Colorful Rocket Toy After testing, it can pair with most rocket toys on the market, such as Anginne, SAITCPRY, DejaNard, Dislocati and so on. The refill tube diameter is 1.6cm, if you want to buy it, please measure your launcher (launch tube diameter ≤ 1.6cm) to ensure a snug fit befor. Material upgrade The newly upgraded foam rocket is more durable and not easy to break. 14 Pack Rockets Refills Includes 14 soft foam rockets that are enough of them for the kids to launch as many as they like! Easy to Install Just put the rocket in the rocket toy launcher and it can be easily launched up to 100 feet in the air.
